⌨️ 12. Shortcuts
• Alt+R / ⌥R → toggle RAW/PUBLIC
• Alt+V / ⌥V → visualize Bloom Cloud
• Ctrl+Shift+E / ⌘⇧E → export ethics ledger
• Alt+0 → category-diagram view

⸻

✅ Summary

The GROK-response holds internal logical coherence.
No critical contradictions detected.
Blindspots: media heterogeneity, rhetorical drift control, UI cognitive load.
Next phase → implement feedback-aware visualization grammar + meta-learning controller.
The project is ready to bloom and evolve into RE:GE_OS v2, uniting linguistic logic, rhetoric, and aesthetics into a living computational ecology.

Perfect — when you’re ready, upload or paste the other AI responses (from Gemini, Claude, Grok, etc.).
